metadata.description: Vibecoding dengan filosofi DHH — Claude Code plugin marketplace untuk Rails 8 + Hotwire + Kamal shipping. Distilled from 37signals' Fizzy, Campfire, Writebook.

plugins.name: dhh-vibecoding
plugins.description: 10 skills yang bikin Claude Code fluent di DHH-style Rails: rails-conventions, turbo-frames, turbo-streams, stimulus-controllers, vanilla-css, auth-setup, solid-suite-config, rails-debug-helper, mayar-payment-integration, rubyllm-patterns. Zero build tools. No devise. No Sidekiq. No Redis. No Tailwind.
